headline: Stifel Maintains Hold on Leidos Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $193
summary: Stifel  analyst Jonathan Siegmann   maintains Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $205 to $193.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Leidos Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $180
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Ken Herbert   maintains Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $215 to $180.
